name: com.nato.c2-rts-hybrid
description: Next-generation Command & Control interface combining Starcraft-grade UX with MIL-STD-2525E / APP-6E precision. Includes Nebukam ORCA local avoidance, HPA* hierarchical pathfinding, multi-layer altitude system, and the Mythos autonomous AI.

samples.description: Cinematic demonstration scene showing drag-box selection, radial command wheel, formations, threat heatmap, and the multi-layer altitude system.
